reason: tests require exact code strings (e.g. 'private val cache = mutableMapOf<SymbolForAnalysis, Stability>()', 'if (fullSymbol in cache)', 'return cache[fullSymbol]!!', 'cache[fullSymbol] = result', 'currentlyAnalyzing.contains(symbol)') that are impossible to include in instruction.md without committing solution leakage. Including these literal strings IS the solution patch. Additionally, solution_uniqueness_guard and tests_verify_behavior_not_text fail because tests use exact text matching rather than behavioral verification — these are test-level problems that cannot be fixed by editing instruction.md.
